script.name: plugin.guilds.taskmenu
script.sourceplaintext:
$Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' $page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' $table.tasks = $Guilds.Data['tasks']
if $a.event == [MEvent.Start] set global variable: name='menu.taskid' value=$a.data gosub sub.CreateMenu return $input end
return null
sub.CreateMenu: $task.id = get global variable: name='menu.taskid' $task.data = $table.tasks[$task.id] $guild = $task.data[0]
$menu = create custom menu array $text = $task.data[2][0] $text = read text: page=$page.id id=$text add info line heading to menu: $menu, heading=$text $text = $task.data[2][1] $text = read text: page=$page.id id=$text gosub sub.ConvertText add custom menu hyperlinked info: menu=$menu, text=$text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.QMenus] id=80101 add info line heading to menu: $menu, heading=$read.text $sector = $task.data[3] $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=715 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$sector add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text $sector.owner = $sector -> get owner race $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104205 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$sector.owner add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text $enemy = $task.data[8] if $enemy $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=216 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$enemy add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text end
$read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=4250 add info line heading to menu: $menu, heading=$read.text $level = $task.data[6][0] $tmp = $Guilds.Data[$guild]['ranks'] $level = $tmp[$level] $text = read text: page=$page.id id=$level $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=214 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text $level = $task.data[6][1] $level = $level + 4711 $text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=$level $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=215 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=162 add info line heading to menu: $menu, heading=$read.text $reward = $task.data[7]['money'] $reward = convert number $reward to string $read.text = read text: page=[Page.ObjDesc] id=6153 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$reward add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text $reward = $task.data[7]['xp'] if $reward $reward = convert number $reward to string $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=1009 $text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$reward add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text end
set menu option: $menu, icon=71 set menu option: $menu, no select lines=[TRUE]
$text = $Guilds.Data[$guild]['name'] $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=$text $text = $task.data[4][0] if $text == 'combat.md' $text = read text: page=$page.id id=164 else $text = read text: page=$page.id id=163 end $input = create input: id='task.briefing' menu=$menu title=$text description=$read.text callback=null endsub return null
sub.ConvertText: $start.idx = find position of pattern '{' in $text if $start.idx > -1 $idx = $start.idx $len = get length of string $text $depth = 1 while $idx <= $len inc $idx = $char = get substring of $text offset=$idx length=1 if $char == '{' inc $depth = else if $char == '}' dec $depth = if $depth <= 0 $len = $idx - $start.idx + 1 $tmp = get substring of $text offset=$start.idx length=$len $split = split string: $tmp separator='_' $tmp2 = get last item in array: $split $len = get length of string $tmp2 dec $len = $tmp2 = get substring of $tmp2 offset=0 length=$len $tmp2 = sprintf: fmt='::%s::', $tmp2, null, null, null, null $text = substitute in string $text: pattern $tmp with $tmp2 break end end end end
$replace = $task.data[3] $replace = sprintf: fmt='%s', $replace, null, null, null, null $text = substitute in string $text: pattern '::Sector::' with $replace
endsub return null

line.text: add info line heading to menu:
add custom menu hyperlinked info: menu=
add info line heading to menu:
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
add info line heading to menu:
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
add info line heading to menu:
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
create text for custom menu, left=
add custom menu info line to array
